message:
fix: correct plugin.json format

- Change author from string to object with name/email
- Remove skills field (auto-discovered from skills/ directory)
- Add BETA warning to description

files.patch:
@@ -1,12 +1,13 @@
 {
   "name": "using-chrome-directly",
   "version": "1.0.0",
-  "description": "Direct browser control without MCP - Chrome DevTools Protocol access via lightweight chrome-ws tool",
-  "author": "Jesse Vincent",
+  "description": "BETA: VERY LIGHTLY TESTED - Direct browser control without MCP - Chrome DevTools Protocol access via lightweight chrome-ws tool",
+  "author": {
+    "name": "Jesse Vincent",
+    "email": "jesse@fsck.com"
+  },
+  "homepage": "https://github.com/obra/superpower-using-chrome-directly",
   "repository": "https://github.com/obra/superpower-using-chrome-directly",
   "license": "MIT",
-  "keywords": ["chrome", "browser", "automation", "devtools", "cdp", "websocket"],
-  "skills": {
-    "using-chrome-directly": "skills/using-chrome-directly/SKILL.md"
-  }
+  "keywords": ["chrome", "browser", "automation", "devtools", "cdp", "websocket"]
 }
